name: Nancy Gossett
quote: I highly recommend the Being at Full Potential course for anyone who wishes to fully understand the deeper factors that allow us and/or our clients to really thrive in our lives and businesses. The framework for BFP is astoundingly powerful and especially useful for leadership development and executive growth coaches. Beginning with the foundational iceberg concept that teaches us what the outside world sees vs what is going on beneath the surface, this course offers both visual and intellectual tools that allow us to delve further into our subconscious being. I know that I will be incorporating the learning into my practice both professionally and personally.

name: Priyanka Deshmukh
quote: This course will help you look at human potential or your own potential differently. It is not just about the results you get or achievements you have had. Potential is also a lot about the qualities that are there within you, however you might not have gotten the environment to bring them up to the surface or to really genuinely and with ease engage with them or you did not get enough acknowledgment for them. However, this course will bring your attention to a variety of aspects and human qualities that have the capacity to elevate our being, our experience of life and even our way of doing and showing up in this world. It invites us to look at those aspects that most psychometric assessments and other assessments have ignored and take us little deeper in really knowing and understanding ourselves as individuals and leaders.

name: Amrita Singh
quote: This course make the intangible being so tangible & shines the light on what being at full potential could look like - and allows you to charter your path for yourself, with no judgment at all. The purity of the intent makes this such a sacred & safe tool to work with for yourself & take to others, in service of the larger good !!

name: CAROLINE LANCELOT
quote: The HP development coach training is an inspiring journey that aims at both personal growth and development as a coach with two inspiring mentors (Mark and Peter) from whom you will learn a lot. Going from the doing to the being is such a tremendous discovery of who we are really and how we can all together contribute to a better world.

name: Thea Courage Coach
quote: Through this journey, I've come to deeply appreciate that the essence of true growth lies in the 'being', a discovery that has brought profound richness and fulfillment into my life. As a practitioner, coach, and entrepreneur, the course has helped me connect more authentically with others and deepen my impact. It has also inspired new possibilities within my corporate role, where I've begun to explore integrating external expertise around self-awareness and mindfulness into the organization. This experience has opened up a new sphere of influence for me, one that bridges professional excellence with conscious leadership.

name: Nidhi Arora
quote: The course was an amazing experience! It was fun yet profoundly deep in helping me understand who I am, my capabilities, and how it all fits together in the context of an organisation. Each module was engaging, the group sessions went even deeper, and the participants I met along the way added so much value with their unique perspectives and personalities. The course brought everything to life for me, I found many missing pieces of my puzzle. It left me with a deeper connection to myself and practical tools I can use daily and wanting more. Highly recommend it for personal growth and building meaningful connections with self and organizations.

name: Simon Eggerschwiler
quote:
This certification program has helped me to see my inner world through the lense of a diver. Being at Full Potential means diving into the unknown, sometimes even in the darkness of your personality. Knowing, that we all realize only a part of it consciously, you can let you go trustfully into the process of discovering your personal potential in depth. Far from fear but with compassion for yourself and with a precious patience you start seeing the beautiful signs of life in your inner sea such as all four being states (being aware, being inspired, being abundant & being in service) and how you can further develop them. You get even more light into the depth of your dive, if you contemplate the eight being attitudes and the 23 dimension of your human potential. How can you enlighten further your human qualities in order to live how you feel to.

It was not only a certification course but the start to my own dive of life in order lifting treasures of & for humanity. Thanks from the bottom of my heart to Peter & Mark and my friends, who where my precious buddys along this experience. In love from Lucerne/Switzerland.

name: Jonathan Nungaray
quote: This program has helped me in my coaching style by showing me a third way of being. How to help clients view professional development work from the perspective of relationships with yourself and others.

name: Lakshmi Arora
quote: The course is a wonderful experience filled with inspirational and insightful content. It excels in various aspects, from engaging content to interactive sessions that promote personal growth and practical application. The learning space is supportive and provides great resources for exploration. It is a holistic guide to a framework to unlock one's full potential. I am grateful for the positivity and knowledge received from the course.

name: Laura Luna
quote:
The Being at Full Potential assessment and frameworks have led me to a deeper understanding of who I am as a leader and have clarified my commitment to how I want to contribute to the world. Becoming certified in this methodology was very important to me as a means of sharing supportive practices in my coaching of others.

The Being at Full Potential assessment is an incredible tool for powerful growth in leadership. One can feel the intuitive wisdom within the foundation of the assessment and frameworks, and the insights one gains can lead to transformative reflection and conversation.

Mark Vandeneijnde and Peter Leong are wonderfully wise facilitators and guides of the certification process and supported participants in rich practice to experience the power of the assessment in action. Being in community with coaches across the globe was such a rewarding experience that helped me expand my perspective.

I highly recommend this certification course and found it to be a tremendously valuable experience.
